repos.name: System_Backup___Restore
repos.description: Create system images, backup files, and restore when needed. Protect your data from crashes and malware. Full system backup.
repos.summary: Create system images, backup files, and restore when needed. Protect your data from crashes and malware. Full system backup.

repos.name: Twitter_Engagement_Tool
repos.description: Auto-tweet, follow/unfollow, and like/retweet scheduler. Schedule tweets, gain followers, like tweets, and reply to mentions. Grow your Twitter audience.
repos.summary: Auto-tweet, follow/unfollow, and like/retweet scheduler. Schedule tweets, gain followers, like tweets, and reply to mentions. Grow your Twitter audience.

repos.name: Virtual_Machine_Manager
repos.description: Run and manage virtual machines with ease. Supports VMware, VirtualBox, and Hyper-V. Create, start, and stop VMs.
repos.summary: Run and manage virtual machines with ease. Supports VMware, VirtualBox, and Hyper-V. Create, start, and stop VMs.

repos.name: System_Information_Viewer
repos.description: Show detailed hardware and software info. Show processor details, memory usage, graphics card info, and Windows version. Get full system specs.
repos.summary: Show detailed hardware and software info. Show processor details, memory usage, graphics card info, and Windows version. Get full system specs.

repos.name: Spotify_Playlist_Booster
repos.description: Increase followers, playlist streams, and auto-like songs. Play songs on loop, get fake followers, like all songs, and create playlists automatically. Grow your Spotify presence.
repos.summary: Increase followers, playlist streams, and auto-like songs. Play songs on loop, get fake followers, like all songs, and create playlists automatically. Grow your Spotify presence.
